features: 1. UNIQUE ODOUR FIGHTING TECHNOLOGY: Febreze bathroom air freshener with unique odour fighter technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent in your bathroom and home.
2. NON-FLAMMABLE SPRAY: Febreze Spray Air Freshenersare non-flammable, perfect for any room in the house.

3. SPRING AWAKENING: Experience the light green fragrance of spring awakening, inspired by the natural freshness of Lenor. This Febreze Spray Air Freshener will transport your senses to a blooming spring garden.
4. FRESH SCENT: This room air freshener leaves your home with a beautiful light, fresh scent.

5. VERSATILE USE: This Febreze Spray Air Freshenerdoubles as a room freshener and toilet freshener, making it a versatile addition to your home cleaning supplies. Use it as a room spray fragrance or a bathroom spray for a fresh, clean scent.
description: Product Description Febreze Air Freshener with Odourclear technology fights tough lingering odours, leaving a light fresh scent. With 2x the normal odour fighting ingredients, our toughest air freshener with OdourClear technology doesn’t just mask odours, it truly fights them leaving a beautiful fresh scent. Whether you have persistent pet pongs, tough tobacco smells, or other household whiffs that just won’t leave, there’s a Febreze Heavy Duty air freshener for you. Febreze Aerosols are non-flammable and contain 100% natural propellant. This makes them a perfect fit for any room in the house. Try the full range of Febreze products with the unique Odourclear technology, such as Febreze Fabric Refresher and Car Freshener. Also try 3volution Plugs, to continuously fight odours and freshen for up to 90 days Ingredients Water, Alcohol Denat, PEG-60 Hydrogenated Caster Oil, Fragances, Sodium Citrate, Hydroxypropyl clycodextrin, Benzisothiazolinone, Nitrogen Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP, UK See more
